name: games played
expected_query: with "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count as games_played_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
